description: Legal document. Quittance/release (שטר אביזאריה). Mivḥar b. Ṣedaqa releases Moshe b. Moshe known as Ibn Majjān from all obligations except for an ounce of זבאר(?), a dinar and a half, a cloak (ʿabā'a) and some oil (nafṭ), in partnership with Abū l-Faḍl al-Dhahabī(?). There is another legal document on recto written around a reused fiscal account.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
